question: What two abilities does a Valorian 'Mind-Smith' possess in their craft?

answers.ground_truth: A Valorian 'Mind-Smith' can forge 'Thought-Metal' and perform 'Memory-Welding'.
answers.original: A Valorian 'Mind-Smith' can forge Thought-Metal and perform Memory-Welding.

ops.description: Vexium was discovered in the Andromeda galaxy.
Gleebs are native fauna of Zylos that are unaffected by Chronium.
Xandrian years last 400 Earth days, reflecting Xandria's unique time measurement.

The Floating Islands of Aeridia are primarily composed of Aeridium Ore, which provides their buoyancy.<SEP>Aeridium Ore allows the Floating Islands of Aeridia to move slowly across the sky and is considered sacred by many cultures.<SEP>The Floating Islands of Aeridia are primarily composed of Aeridium Ore, which provides buoyancy.
The Citadel is built on a high mountain peak.

entities.name: Mind-Smith
entities.description: Mind-Smiths are Valorians who can forge Thought-Metal and perform Memory-Welding.

entities.name: Forge-Guild of Valor
entities.description: The Forge-Guild of Valor oversees all metalworking trades.

entities.name: Valorian
entities.description: Valorians are individuals capable of forging Thought-Metal and performing Memory-Welding.

entities.name: Valorian Apprentices
entities.description: Valorian apprentices begin training at age twelve.

relations.description: Mind-Smiths can forge Thought-Metal by solidifying pure mental energy into physical form.
Valorian apprentices begin training at age twelve to become Mind-Smiths.
The Forge-Guild of Valor oversees all metalworking trades, including those performed by Mind-Smiths.
Valorians celebrate the changing of the seasons through festivals.
Mind-Smiths possess the ability to perform Memory-Welding to bond experiences and knowledge into metallic creations.
Mind-Smiths undergo decades of mental conditioning.
Memory-Welding requires intense concentration and focus, a skill possessed by Mind-Smiths.
The Council of Smiths regulates the use of Mind-Smith abilities.

entities.name: Aether-Blossom
entities.description: Aether-Blossom is a plant whose sap is used to create Lumin-Ink.

entities.name: Glow-Moss
entities.description: Glow-Moss is a rare bioluminescent plant whose finely ground powder is a key component in creating Sunpetal Balm.<SEP>Glow-Moss is a rare bioluminescent plant whose finely ground powder is a key component in Sunpetal Balm.

entities.name: Critical Reviews
entities.description: Critical reviews in the Crystalline Sound Weaving scene focus on the intricacy of sonic patterns and harmonic structure.

entities.name: Quantum Physics
entities.description: Quantum Physics governs the strange laws of the realm where Quantum 'Reality-Shapers' exist.
